name: Fleet Scale Inventory API Probe
description: Executed non-destructive Roadmap S probe that uses tamandua-ctl to validate authenticated fleet inventory, agent identity uniqueness, cross-platform inventory, online/offline state split, and online health status. It does not execute simultaneous workloads or prove scale latency/loss.
claim_boundary: Authenticated fleet inventory/state proof only. Full Roadmap S still requires simultaneous workloads, latency/loss metrics, and cross-agent evidence isolation.

tests.name: Authenticated CLI can list fleet inventory
Fleet inventory has unique non-empty agent IDs
Fleet inventory includes at least two OS platforms
Fleet inventory exposes online and offline state split
Online agents have healthy or degraded health state
